data.body: Plan-review gate earned for epic elfish-chair-lug (88ab): 3 runs, all PASS 0-blocking. Run 1 (19 adv) -> amended description (commit-msg hook prereq, g2p contradiction resolved, files/-default fixture as S2 first step, merge-context schema/cap, observability, named ACL group, submit-type transition safety, observable S6). Run 2 (20 adv) -> amended (gate data-flow seam pinned, tag-suffix semantics, setup-project.sh want-dict, REST-failure fallbacks, stale-branch inventory, rollback paths, named constants, bounded fan-out). Run 3 (20 adv, child-story depth) -> disposition recorded as non-material comment: 8 findings assigned to S1/S2/S3 child stories at decomposition, 6 justified (g2p pre-1fa8 horizon, user-directed 1fa8 assumption, canonical-REST-auto-merge over local recompute, fail-closed-equals-current-behavior canary argument, group+gates bound pushMerge, house AC style). Attestation: PASS, material 590ca92a49fe7889, dep-pinned over 12 files, signed at d96628c9. Epic is claimable.
